name: aero-p2p-chat
description: A clean peer-to-peer chat client for Windows, Linux, and Android.

scripts.test: node --check src/main/index.js && node --check src/preload/index.js && node --check scripts/build-chrome-addon.cjs && node --check electron-builder.config.cjs && node --check scripts/build-android.cjs && node --check scripts/build-linux-docker.cjs && node --check scripts/install-android-device.cjs && node --check scripts/build-inno.cjs && node --check scripts/build-store.cjs && node --check scripts/build-win.cjs && node --check scripts/ci-build-release.cjs && node --check scripts/ci-create-latest.cjs && node --check scripts/ci-append-linux-latest.cjs && node --check scripts/deploy-pages.cjs && node --check scripts/dev-two.cjs && node --check scripts/release-help.cjs && node --check scripts/release.cjs && node --check scripts/run-electron-vite.cjs
scripts.android:sync: npm run renderer:build && npx cap sync android
